channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Meta Cut 8,000 Jobs. She Kept Hers, But Lost Her Team And Title

media:content.media:description: Three years on, Meta job cuts have expanded from 11,000 to more than 30,000.

item.description: In April, Meta employees were told that 8,000 or 10 per cent of the workforce would be laid off in May as the company readied itself for the era of artificial intelligence. Thousands more would be reassigned to AI initiatives.
item.content:encoded: In April, Meta employees were told that 8,000 or 10 per cent of the workforce would be laid off in May as the company readied itself for the era of artificial intelligence. Thousands more would be reassigned to AI initiatives.

item.title: US Iran War Live: 'Tehran Must Burn,' Says Israeli Minister As Israel, Iran Trade Attacks

media:content.media:description: US-Iran-Israel War Live Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

item.title: 12 Dead, 200 Injured As 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Philippines, Triggers Tsunami

media:content.media:description: Philippines is often hit by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions.

item.description: 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Philippines, Tsunami Warning Issued

item.title: Iran Attacks 2 Israeli Airbases, Israel Hits Back At Mahshahr Petrochemical Plant

media:content.media:description: The Israeli military said its air defences intercepted missiles from at 3 barrages

item.description: Iran Fires Missiles Into Israel In A First Since April Ceasefire, Iraq, Syria Shut Airspace

item.title: Video: Private Jet In Flames During Emergency Landing In Dominican Republic, 2 Dead

media:content.media:description: The US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas

item.description: According to US media reports, the US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas, when it declared an emergency due to severe mechanical problems.
item.content:encoded: According to US media reports, the US-registered Gulfstream G200 jet was en route to Austin, Texas, when it declared an emergency due to severe mechanical problems.

item.title: US Considers Buying Chagos Islands: Report

media:content.media:description: Britain put on hold its deal to cede sovereignty of the Chagos Islands.

item.description: The White House is considering a plan to buy the Chagos Islands from Mauritius, the Telegraph reported on Sunday. U.S. officials have drawn up a proposal to bypass the U.K. and make
item.content:encoded: The White House is considering a plan to buy the Chagos Islands from Mauritius, the Telegraph reported on Sunday. U.S. officials have drawn up a proposal to bypass the U.K. and make

item.title: 'Strategic Distraction?' Trump Ramps Up AI Memes Ahead Of Midterms

media:content.media:description: The attention-grabbing posts come as Trump's approval ratings slide to new lows.

item.description: From handcuffed extra-terrestrials to an orbital missile command center -- US President Donald Trump is unleashing a relentless stream of AI-generated imagery that analysts view as an effort to dominate the...
item.content:encoded: From handcuffed extra-terrestrials to an orbital missile command center -- US President Donald Trump is unleashing a relentless stream of AI-generated imagery that analysts view as an effort to dominate the...

item.title: Hundreds Of Charlie Chaplin Lookalikes Gather In Switzerland

media:content.media:description: Charlie Chaplin had moved to Switzerland after being barred from the United States in the 1950s.

item.description: More than 400 people donning black bowler hats, toothbrush moustaches and canes gathered in Switzerland Sunday seeking to break the record for the biggest ever...
item.content:encoded: More than 400 people donning black bowler hats, toothbrush moustaches and canes gathered in Switzerland Sunday seeking to break the record for the biggest ever...

item.title: Six Injured In Stabbing At New York's Penn Station

media:content.media:description: Security has been enhanced in the city ahead of the NBA finals and World Cup match.

item.description: Six people were wounded Sunday in a stabbing at New York's Penn Station, the city's mayor said, as the metropolitan area geared up to host two major sporting events --...
item.content:encoded: Six people were wounded Sunday in a stabbing at New York's Penn Station, the city's mayor said, as the metropolitan area geared up to host two major sporting events --...

item.title: "I Call Shots": Trump Says Netanyahu Has "No Choice" But To Accept Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Last week, Trump told Netanyahu, "You're fucking crazy."

item.description: Trump said that Iran's strikes on Israel have not changed his desire to conclude US-Iran negotiations. "It's not going to have any impact on the deal," he said.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1110094/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump said that Iran's strikes on Israel have not changed his desire to conclude US-Iran negotiations. "It's not going to have any impact on the deal," he said.

item.title: US Iran War Highlights: Trump Calls Iran "Crazy", Says He Is "Doing The World A Service"

media:content.media:description: US Iran War Highlights

item.description: US Iran War Live Updates:United States military officials said Iran launched seven ballistic missiles toward neighboring Gulf nations of Kuwait and Bahrain.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates:United States military officials said Iran launched seven ballistic missiles toward neighboring Gulf nations of Kuwait and Bahrain.

item.title: S Jaishankar And Indonesia's Foreign Minister Hold Key Bilateral

media:content.media:description: Indonesian Foreign Minister Sugiono and External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar

item.description: Both sides had "exchanged views on regional and global developments of mutual interest" and reaffirmed their commitment to deeper coordination in regional and multilateral forums
item.content:encoded: Both sides had "exchanged views on regional and global developments of mutual interest" and reaffirmed their commitment to deeper coordination in regional and multilateral forums

item.title: "I've Had Enough. Thank You, Darling": Trump Walks Out Of Fiery Interview

media:content.media:description: This is not the first time Trump has directed sharp words at journalists.

item.description: Welker asked Trump directly whether he had any evidence to support his claims. The president replied, "All I have to do is look," adding that he listens to people.
item.content:encoded: Welker asked Trump directly whether he had any evidence to support his claims. The president replied, "All I have to do is look," adding that he listens to people.

item.title: 'Lebanon Should Have Better Life': Trump Wants Surgical Strikes On Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: A ceasefire was supposed to end fighting between Israel and Hezbollah .

item.description: Israel carried out strikes on Sunday on the southern suburbs of Beirut, a stronghold of the pro-Iranian Hezbollah, saying it was retaliating for attacks targeting its territory.
item.content:encoded: Israel carried out strikes on Sunday on the southern suburbs of Beirut, a stronghold of the pro-Iranian Hezbollah, saying it was retaliating for attacks targeting its territory.

item.title: "They Are Nuts, Crazy": Trump's "Blow Up" Threat To Iran If Peace Deal Fails

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump claimed that the war with Iran was not an endless conflict.

item.description: Talking about a timeline of the peace deal with Iran, negotiations regarding which are still on, Trump said that the two countries were "very close" to it.
item.content:encoded: Talking about a timeline of the peace deal with Iran, negotiations regarding which are still on, Trump said that the two countries were "very close" to it.

item.title: 'Not War, Not Peace': US Troops Adapt To New Normal As Iran Threat Looms

media:content.media:description: Trump declared his ceasefire with Iran in April, but the war has settled into a stalemate.

item.description: Families of US service members also confront stress amid confusion about what is happening during the ceasefire. Iranian state media publishes claims regularly about attacking US ships and aircraft.
item.content:encoded: Families of US service members also confront stress amid confusion about what is happening during the ceasefire. Iranian state media publishes claims regularly about attacking US ships and aircraft.

item.title: Rs 9,49,50,50,00,00,000: Elon Musk's Projected Net Worth And What It Can Buy

media:content.media:description: If current projections hold, the billionaire entrepreneur's net worth could cross the $1 trillion mark.

item.description: A trillion-dollar fortune would be larger than the economies of most countries around the world
item.content:encoded: A trillion-dollar fortune would be larger than the economies of most countries around the world

item.title: "Anachronistic Dream": Kim Jong Un's Sister To US On Denuclearisation Call

media:content.media:description: North Korea has been focusing on enlarging its nuclear arsenal.

item.description: The statement came a day before Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un, in his first visit to the country in seven years.
item.content:encoded: The statement came a day before Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un, in his first visit to the country in seven years.

item.title: London Entrepreneur Stabbed To Death After Money Dispute, Killer Jailed For Life

media:content.media:description: The jury found Abdulkareem guilty of murder, leading to a life sentence with a minimum term of 17 years.

item.description: Prosecutors said a disagreement over finances escalated into violence, with Abdulkareem stabbing Manuel three times using a kitchen knife.
item.content:encoded: Prosecutors said a disagreement over finances escalated into violence, with Abdulkareem stabbing Manuel three times using a kitchen knife.

item.title: 1 Dead, 5 Injured In Multiple Shooting Attacks In Israel-Occupied West Bank

media:content.media:description: Police identified the attacker as a Palestinian citizen of Israel.

item.description: Israel's police said they had killed one attacker. Large cohorts of Israeli soldiers carried out searches in the area, on the ground and by air, for additional assailants.
item.content:encoded: Israel's police said they had killed one attacker. Large cohorts of Israeli soldiers carried out searches in the area, on the ground and by air, for additional assailants.
